description_long: This is a modern bungalow residence with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The structure features large rectangular windows, a garage, and a driveway leading to the main entrance. The property is surrounded by a wooden fence and includes a spacious green lawn with several mature trees and a detached outbuilding, likely a garage or shed. The backyard area is open and landscaped, providing ample outdoor space. The main building is finished in a combination of white and dark exterior materials, with contrasting window frames and doors. The overall layout is open, with clear separation between the living area, garage, and garden.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a garage, and a spacious fenced yard featuring mature trees and a detached outbuilding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, driveway, and a large windowed facade with a fenced yard and trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard, detached outbuilding, and the open green lawn with trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, the garage, and the full extent of the fenced yard.
description_view_3: Angled view from above the backyard, showing the roof, garden, and the arrangement of the main building and outbuilding.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large rectangular windows on multiple facades
